scope: Trainer / Our trainers page — responsive implementation (mobile + tablet + desktop)
instructions: Implement the trainer page from Figma. Build component-by-component. Make it responsive across breakpoints. Use Bodhi design tokens (text-h1..h5, text-mini, text-text-primary/brand/tertiary, bg-surface-*, border-border-*) from apps/web/src/app/globals.css — not inline hex or clamp(). Reuse existing components (site-header, footer, etc.) where they exist. Run autonomously through fetch → decompose → interactions → scout → plan → build → QA. Visual-QA compares built page to Figma at desktop and mobile.
